description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OctoBot-Tentacles-CI that runs on push to master, dev, beta branches and tags, and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: tests, upload_tentacles, and notify. The tests job runs on a matrix of OS (macos-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-latest), architecture (x64), and type (sources, cython), and performs installation, compilation, and testing of OctoBot. The upload_tentacles job uploads tentacles to S3 based on the branch and tag. The notify job sends a Discord notification on failure.
